pages.text: A pact of greed offered to the cursed.$(br2)It improves fortune, affects piglins, increases rewards, and makes trading more favorable.
pages.title: Pact of Infinite Avarice

pages.text: When the curse is deep enough, material rewards can be doubled.$(br2)Killed creatures may drop emeralds, and villagers may offer lower prices.
pages.title: Greed
